hero.title: DeepSeek完成510亿元A轮融资：中国AI行业创纪录里程碑
hero.title_en: DeepSeek Closes Record $51B Series A, Signaling China's AI Ambitions
hero.summary: DeepSeek完成超500亿元首轮外部融资，腾讯、宁德时代、京东等参与投资，投后估值近4000亿元。创始人梁文锋出资200亿元把控公司控制权。
hero.summary_en: DeepSeek raises over 51 billion yuan in its first external funding round, with investors including Tencent, CATL, and JD.com, valuing the company at nearly 400 billion yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng invested 20 billion yuan to maintain control.
hero.content: DeepSeek完成超500亿元首轮外部融资，腾讯、宁德时代、京东等参与投资，投后估值近4000亿元。创始人梁文锋出资200亿元把控公司控制权。
hero.content_en: DeepSeek, the Chinese AI startup behind the DeepSeek-V4-Pro model, has completed its first external funding round totaling over 510 billion yuan (approximately $74 billion), marking the largest single-round financing in China's AI industry. According to sources cited by The Information, the post-money valuation has exceeded 3.38 trillion yuan (over $500 billion). Founder Liang Wenfeng invested approximately 200 billion yuan personally, making him the largest single investor. Other participants include Tencent (100 billion yuan), CATL (50 billion yuan), JD.com and NetEase (30 billion yuan each), and the National AI Industry Investment Fund (10 billion yuan). Notably, Liang imposed strict terms on outside investors: all capital except state funds must go through a limited partnership he controls, with no voting rights, a five-year lock-up period, and full LP identity verification required. This deal transforms DeepSeek from a pure research lab into a platform-type AI company with strategic industrial partnerships.
key_points: DeepSeek完成超500亿元首轮外部融资，腾讯、宁德时代、京东等参与投资，投后估值近4000亿元。创始人梁文锋出资200亿元把控公司控制权。
key_points_en: DeepSeek raises 510+ billion yuan ($74B) in Series A, China's largest AI funding round ever
Post-money valuation reaches ~400 billion yuan ($500B+), up 5x from April's rumored 100B valuation
Founder Liang Wenfeng retains full control with 200 billion yuan personal investment and strict governance terms
Strategic investors include Tencent, CATL, JD.com, NetEase, creating a comprehensive industrial AI ecosystem

articles.title: Anthropic Claude Fable 5发布：编程能力横扫榜单，估值首超OpenAI
articles.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 Dominates Benchmarks, Surpassing OpenAI's Valuation
articles.summary: Anthropic发布Claude Fable 5，SWE-bench Pro得分80.3%领先GPT-5.5达22个百分点。公司估值达9650亿美元，首次超越OpenAI的8520亿美元登顶行业第一。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5, achieving 80.3% on SWE-bench Pro, surpassing GPT-5.5 by 22 percentage points. The company's valuation reaches $965 billion, overtaking OpenAI's $852 billion for the first time.
articles.content: Anthropic发布Claude Fable 5，SWE-bench Pro得分80.3%领先GPT-5.5达22个百分点。公司估值达9650亿美元，首次超越OpenAI的8520亿美元登顶行业第一。
articles.content_en: Anthropic officially released Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 on June 10, marking the first time the company brought Mythos-class capabilities to broader users. Fable 5 achieved unprecedented benchmark results: 80.3% on SWE-bench Pro versus GPT-5.5's 58.6%, a gap of 22 percentage points. The Artificial Analysis general intelligence index scored 64.9 points, ranking first among all models, with Fable 5 winning 5 out of 10 individual benchmarks. This performance has driven Anthropic's valuation to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI's $852 billion valuation for the first time. The Claude series now spans four tiers: Haiku, Sonnet, Opus, and Mythos, with Fable 5 belonging to the Opus tier while Mythos 5 targets specific professional domains with advanced capabilities.
key_points: Anthropic发布Claude Fable 5，SWE-bench Pro得分80.3%领先GPT-5.5达22个百分点。公司估值达9650亿美元，首次超越OpenAI的8520亿美元登顶行业第一。
key_points_en: Claude Fable 5 scores 80.3% on SWE-bench Pro, exceeding GPT-5.5 by 22 percentage points
Anthropic's valuation reaches $965B, surpassing OpenAI ($852B) for the first time
The model achieves top scores on 5 out of 10 individual benchmarks and 64.9 on the Artificial Analysis general intelligence index
Claude Mythos 5, with fewer safety restrictions, is only available to trusted cybersecurity partners through Project Glasswing

articles.title: 七部门联合印发AI平台经济行动方案：明确三大核心扶持赛道
articles.title_en: Seven Chinese Ministries Jointly Issue AI Platform Economy Action Plan
articles.summary: 工信部等七部门联合印发《促进平台经济大中小企业协同发展行动方案》，首次将通用大模型、行业大模型、AI智能体列为三大核心扶持赛道，推动AI从概念走向实体产业生产力。
articles.summary_en: Seven Chinese ministries jointly issue the Platform Economy Coordinated Development Action Plan, designating general AI models, industry-specific models, and AI agents as three core supported tracks, pushing AI from concept to real industrial productivity.
articles.content: 工信部等七部门联合印发《促进平台经济大中小企业协同发展行动方案》，首次将通用大模型、行业大模型、AI智能体列为三大核心扶持赛道，推动AI从概念走向实体产业生产力。
articles.content_en: China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, along with six other ministries, jointly issued the Action Plan for Promoting Coordinated Development of Large, Medium, and Small Enterprises in the Platform Economy (2026-2028). For the first time, the policy explicitly designates three core supported tracks: general-purpose foundation models, industry-specific vertical models, and task-oriented AI agents. The policy aims to shift AI development from parameter racing and conceptual炒作 to practical value delivery. The core logic centers on large enterprises opening up computing power and models while small and medium enterprises focus on industry-specific application scenarios, unified by industrial standards. This approach is designed to transform AI from a chat-based conceptual tool into a productive carrier capable of independently completing cross-system tasks.
key_points: 工信部等七部门联合印发《促进平台经济大中小企业协同发展行动方案》，首次将通用大模型、行业大模型、AI智能体列为三大核心扶持赛道，推动AI从概念走向实体产业生产力。
key_points_en: Seven ministries designate general AI models, industry vertical models, and AI agents as three core supported tracks
Policy aims to break resource fragmentation between tech giants and SMEs in AI development
Industry standards for AI agents will require genuine cross-system capability, eliminating fake agents
Short-term benefits favor computing hardware and general model leaders; long-term growth in industry-specific models and agent solutions

articles.title: 谷歌微软联合发布ARD标准：传统科技巨头围堵AI新贵
articles.title_en: Google and Microsoft Form ARD Alliance to Counter OpenAI and Anthropic
articles.summary: 谷歌、微软联合Salesforce、Snowflake等数十家企业发布ARD（代理资源发现）AI智能体行业标准，形成传统企业软件阵营统一联盟。OpenAI、Anthropic全程未参与，标志行业标准壁垒战正式开启。
articles.summary_en: Google, Microsoft, and dozens of enterprise software providers jointly release the ARD (Agentic Resource Discovery) standard for AI agents, forming a unified alliance of traditional enterprise software. OpenAI and Anthropic were excluded, signaling the start of industry standard warfare.
articles.content: 谷歌、微软联合Salesforce、Snowflake等数十家企业发布ARD（代理资源发现）AI智能体行业标准，形成传统企业软件阵营统一联盟。OpenAI、Anthropic全程未参与，标志行业标准壁垒战正式开启。
articles.content_en: Google and Microsoft, leading cloud providers, have jointly released the Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD) standard with Salesforce, Snowflake, ServiceNow, and dozens of other enterprise software companies. The new standard is explicitly designed to exclude OpenAI and Anthropic, who were not involved in drafting, did not sign the supporting agreement, and have no plans for adaptation. The ARD protocol establishes traditional cloud vendors as the primary gateway for enterprise AI, with third-party models like Claude and ChatGPT only allowed as underlying plugins. This directly counters Anthropic's MCP (Model Context Protocol) approach, which positions large models as the central nervous system with autonomous data access. The ARD alliance controls identity verification, data masking, permission approval, and operational auditing through Google Cloud, Azure, and Salesforce platforms.
key_points: 谷歌、微软联合Salesforce、Snowflake等数十家企业发布ARD（代理资源发现）AI智能体行业标准，形成传统企业软件阵营统一联盟。OpenAI、Anthropic全程未参与，标志行业标准壁垒战正式开启。
key_points_en: Google and Microsoft lead ARD standard formation, explicitly excluding OpenAI and Anthropic from enterprise AI gateway
ARD protocol positions traditional cloud vendors as the primary AI entry point, reducing third-party models to plugins
Enterprise AI market expected to bifurcate: traditional enterprises using ARD ecosystem vs. innovative companies using independent AI models
ARD native compatibility with GCP and Azure creates significant deployment cost advantages over third-party model providers

articles.title: 谷歌痛失两大顶尖科学家：Transformer之父与诺奖得主同日跳槽
articles.title_en: Google Loses Two Top Scientists: Transformer Inventor and Nobel Laureate Join Rivals
articles.summary: 短短48小时内，谷歌接连流失两大基石级科学家：Transformer核心发明人Noam Shazeer重返OpenAI，诺贝尔化学奖得主John Jumper加盟Anthropic。预示全球AI生命科学万亿赛道争夺战全面开打。
articles.summary_en: Within 48 hours, Google lost two cornerstone scientists: Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer rejoined OpenAI, and Nobel Chemistry laureate John Jumper joined Anthropic, signaling an intensifying global battle for the trillion-dollar AI life sciences market.
articles.content: 短短48小时内，谷歌接连流失两大基石级科学家：Transformer核心发明人Noam Shazeer重返OpenAI，诺贝尔化学奖得主John Jumper加盟Anthropic。预示全球AI生命科学万亿赛道争夺战全面开打。
articles.content_en: Google DeepMind experienced its most significant talent exodus within 48 hours. Noam Shazeer, co-author of the groundbreaking 'Attention Is All You Need' paper and architect of multi-head attention mechanisms, has officially rejoined OpenAI as head of architecture research. He previously returned to Google in 2024 after his company Character.AI was acquired for $2.7 billion. Simultaneously, John Jumper—Nobel Chemistry laureate and creator of AlphaFold—announced his departure from Google DeepMind after nine years, saying he will rest before joining Anthropic full-time. Jumper's AlphaFold has predicted structures for nearly 200 million proteins, a thousand-fold increase over traditional experimental methods, and has been used by over 2 million researchers across 190 countries. Anthropic has been aggressively building its life sciences capabilities, including a $400 million acquisition of Coefficient Bio and plans to leverage Jumper's expertise to compress biological R&D cycles tenfold.
key_points: 短短48小时内，谷歌接连流失两大基石级科学家：Transformer核心发明人Noam Shazeer重返OpenAI，诺贝尔化学奖得主John Jumper加盟Anthropic。预示全球AI生命科学万亿赛道争夺战全面开打。
key_points_en: Transformer inventor Noam Shazeer returns to OpenAI as head of architecture research, strengthening its LLM foundation capabilities
Nobel laureate John Jumper, AlphaFold creator, leaves DeepMind for Anthropic, targeting AI-driven pharmaceutical revolution
Over 20 milestone paper authors have departed DeepMind in 8 years; 11 executives left in 2025 alone
Anthropic acquires Coefficient Bio for $400M and establishes wet lab facilities to pursue full-cycle AI biology R&D

articles.title: 中国短视频AI内容标注新规落地：9.8万个账号被处置
articles.title_en: China's Short Video AI Content Labeling Rules Take Effect: 98,000 Accounts Sanctioned
articles.summary: 中央网信办6月12日上线「涉AI应用乱象举报专区」，全面受理14类AI违规行为举报。配合5月短视频6类必选标签强制落地，已处置违规账号9.8万余个，AI内容全生命周期治理闭环形成。
articles.summary_en: China's Cyberspace Administration launched the 'AI Application Chaos Reporting Zone' on June 12, accepting 14 categories of AI violations. Combined with mandatory short video labeling rules from May, over 98,000 accounts have been sanctioned, completing the full lifecycle governance of AI content.
articles.content: 中央网信办6月12日上线「涉AI应用乱象举报专区」，全面受理14类AI违规行为举报。配合5月短视频6类必选标签强制落地，已处置违规账号9.8万余个，AI内容全生命周期治理闭环形成。
articles.content_en: China's Cyberspace Administration (CAC) officially launched the 'AI Application Chaos Reporting Zone' on June 12, accepting reports across 14 categories of AI violations including unregistered large models, training data security issues, inadequate implementation of synthetic content identification, use of AI to distort classic works, release of false information, and infringement of minors' rights. This follows the mandatory short video labeling policy implemented on May 12, which requires publishers to select from six mandatory labels: 'contains fictional content,' 'contains AI-generated content,' 'contains marketing information,' 'reposted content,' 'personal opinions,' or 'no labeling required.' As of now, internet regulation departments have instructed platforms to sanction over 98,000 accounts for failing to properly label short video content. The 'substance over form' principle governs labeling decisions: AI rewriting, style transfer, and cross-modal generation require full labeling, while AI proofreading and formatting do not.
key_points: 中央网信办6月12日上线「涉AI应用乱象举报专区」，全面受理14类AI违规行为举报。配合5月短视频6类必选标签强制落地，已处置违规账号9.8万余个，AI内容全生命周期治理闭环形成。
key_points_en: CAC launches AI Application Chaos Reporting Zone accepting 14 violation categories including unregistered models and AI content misuse
Mandatory six-category labeling for short videos requires creators to select appropriate labels before publishing
Over 98,000 accounts sanctioned for non-compliant AI content labeling, indicating strict enforcement
Three-tier liability system established: creators bear terminal responsibility, tech providers bear source responsibility, platforms bear ultimate responsibility

articles.title: HBM存储涨价50%：AI芯片成本飙升倒逼国产替代加速
articles.title_en: HBM Storage Prices Surge 50%, AI Chip Costs Spike: Domestic Alternatives Accelerate
articles.summary: 华泰证券研报显示，HBM存储采购成本下半年涨幅超50%，AI芯片综合制造成本将飙升30-50%。豆包大模型日均Token调用突破120万亿，需求井喷与成本海啸形成黄金布局窗口。
articles.summary_en: Huatai Securities reports HBM storage procurement costs will surge over 50% in the second half of 2026, with comprehensive AI chip manufacturing costs expected to spike 30-50%. Meanwhile, Doubao model's daily token usage exceeds 12 trillion, creating a golden window for domestic alternatives.
articles.content: 华泰证券研报显示，HBM存储采购成本下半年涨幅超50%，AI芯片综合制造成本将飙升30-50%。豆包大模型日均Token调用突破120万亿，需求井喷与成本海啸形成黄金布局窗口。
articles.content_en: Huatai Securities released a research report titled 'AI+ Inflation Series: AI Chips May Usher in a Price Increase Window,' revealing that HBM storage procurement costs will surge over 50% in the second half of 2026, with comprehensive AI chip manufacturing costs expected to rise 30-50%. The report uses NVIDIA's B200 as an example: the total chip manufacturing cost is approximately $6,400, with HBM storage accounting for 45% ($2,900), advanced packaging CoWoS-L at 17% ($1,100), and the computing logic die only 15% ($900). Doubao model has seen its daily token calls exceed 120 trillion, doubling in just three months. The report highlights Cambricon, Hygon Information, Biren Technology, and Moore Threads as primary beneficiaries of domestic substitution, with Cambricon's new generation Deep Computing DCU products showing steady progress.
key_points: 华泰证券研报显示，HBM存储采购成本下半年涨幅超50%，AI芯片综合制造成本将飙升30-50%。豆包大模型日均Token调用突破120万亿，需求井喷与成本海啸形成黄金布局窗口。
key_points_en: HBM storage costs expected to rise 50%+ in H2 2026, driving AI chip manufacturing costs up 30-50%
NVIDIA B200 chip example shows HBM accounts for 45% of total cost ($2,900), exceeding logic die costs
Cambricon, Hygon, Biren Technology, and Moore Threads positioned as beneficiaries of domestic chip substitution
Doubao model's daily token usage exceeds 120 trillion tokens, tripling demand within three months

articles.title: Anthropic IPO定档7月9日，OpenAI同步冲刺资本市场
articles.title_en: Anthropic IPO Set for July 9, OpenAI Races to Complete Public Offering
articles.summary: Anthropic将于7月9日举行IPO前财务研讨会，Q2收入预计超109亿美元同比翻倍。OpenAI已向SEC秘密递交IPO申请，两家AI巨头几乎同时冲刺上市，创科技史先例。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic schedules IPO pre-IPO financial seminar for July 9, with Q2 revenue projected to exceed $10.9 billion, doubling year-over-year. OpenAI has secretly filed IPO application with SEC, with both AI giants racing toward public markets simultaneously.
articles.content: Anthropic将于7月9日举行IPO前财务研讨会，Q2收入预计超109亿美元同比翻倍。OpenAI已向SEC秘密递交IPO申请，两家AI巨头几乎同时冲刺上市，创科技史先例。
articles.content_en: Anthropic has scheduled its pre-IPO investor seminar for July 9 in Florida, hosted by CFO Krishna Rao, focusing on financial trajectory, capital structure expansion, revenue growth forecasts, and enterprise market penetration strategy. According to the Wall Street Journal, Anthropic's Q2 revenue is expected to exceed $10.9 billion, compared to $4.8 billion in Q1, representing over 100% growth. The company's annualized revenue trajectory shows $9 billion in January, $19 billion in March, and $45 billion in May—a truly extraordinary growth curve. Simultaneously, OpenAI confirmed on June 10 that it has secretly filed an IPO application with the SEC. The company also launched interest-based in-chat advertising in Japan on June 19, its first overseas expansion of the ad model following the US pilot in February. Anthropic's valuation reportedly stands at $965 billion, while OpenAI's valuation is approximately $852 billion.
key_points: Anthropic将于7月9日举行IPO前财务研讨会，Q2收入预计超109亿美元同比翻倍。OpenAI已向SEC秘密递交IPO申请，两家AI巨头几乎同时冲刺上市，创科技史先例。
key_points_en: Anthropic's IPO pre-presentation scheduled for July 9, with Q2 revenue projected at $10.9B, doubling from Q1
Anthropic's annualized revenue grew from $9B (January) to $45B (May) in just five months
OpenAI secretly files IPO application with SEC while launching ad-supported ChatGPT in Japan
First time in tech history two AI giants race toward IPO simultaneously; Anthropic surpasses OpenAI in valuation

articles.title: 智谱GLM-5.2开源：Code Arena全球第二，100万Token无损上下文
articles.title_en: Zhipu AI Open-Sources GLM-5.2: Code Arena Global #2, 1M Token Lossless Context
articles.summary: 智谱AI正式开源GLM-5.2模型，Code Arena盲测位列全球可用模型第二、开源模型第一，支持100万无损上下文，能单次处理88万Tokens自主跑完全端全链路开发。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI officially open-sources GLM-5.2 model, ranking #2 globally and #1 among open-source models in Code Arena blind tests, supporting 1M token lossless context and processing 880K tokens per session for full-stack development.
articles.content: 智谱AI正式开源GLM-5.2模型，Code Arena盲测位列全球可用模型第二、开源模型第一，支持100万无损上下文，能单次处理88万Tokens自主跑完全端全链路开发。
articles.content_en: Zhipu AI officially released and open-sourced the GLM-5.2 model on June 17. Key highlights include: 1M lossless context supported through extended Coding Agent training environment optimization addressing long-text degradation; ranking second globally and first among open-source models in Code Arena blind tests; performance between Claude Opus 4.7 and 4.8 on FrontierSWE and other long-task benchmarks; ability to process up to 880,000 tokens in a single session and autonomously complete full-end full-chain development for web, mobile, and mini-programs. Released under the MIT open-source license, GLM-5.2 achieved Day-0 adaptation with Huawei Ascend, T-Head, and Moore Threads domestic computing platforms on its first day. The underlying architecture reduces unit token FLOPs to 2.9x at 1M context through IndexShare architecture and improves speculative decoding efficiency with modified MTP layers.
key_points: 智谱AI正式开源GLM-5.2模型，Code Arena盲测位列全球可用模型第二、开源模型第一，支持100万无损上下文，能单次处理88万Tokens自主跑完全端全链路开发。
key_points_en: GLM-5.2 ranks #2 globally and #1 among open-source models in Code Arena blind tests
Supports 1M token lossless context with ability to process 880K tokens per session for autonomous full-stack development
MIT license enables broad commercial use; Day-0 adaptation completed with Huawei Ascend, T-Head, and Moore Threads platforms
IndexShare architecture reduces unit token FLOPs to 2.9x at 1M context, significantly improving computational efficiency

articles.title: 特斯拉AI6芯片完成工程评审：三星2nm GAA工艺，2028年投产
articles.title_en: Tesla AI6 Chip Completes Engineering Review: Samsung 2nm GAA Process, Production in 2028
articles.summary: 特斯拉第六代自研AI芯片AI6已完成全部工程评审，进入流片前定型阶段。采用三星2nm GAA工艺，算力在AI5基础上翻倍，等效10块当前车载AI4芯片，计划2028年下半年投产。
articles.summary_en: Tesla's sixth-generation AI chip AI6 has completed all engineering reviews, entering the pre-tapeout finalization stage. Using Samsung 2nm GAA process, computing power doubles compared to AI5, equivalent to 10 current AI4 chips, with production scheduled for H2 2028.
articles.content: 特斯拉第六代自研AI芯片AI6已完成全部工程评审，进入流片前定型阶段。采用三星2nm GAA工艺，算力在AI5基础上翻倍，等效10块当前车载AI4芯片，计划2028年下半年投产。
articles.content_en: Tesla CEO Elon Musk confirmed on social media that the company's sixth-generation AI chip AI6 has successfully completed all engineering reviews, with chip design, power architecture, memory solution, and foundry adaptation all passing internal expert panel verification. AI6 will use Samsung's 2nm GAA (Gate-All-Around) process with a long-term exclusive supply contract worth $16.5 billion through 2033. The chip doubles computing power compared to AI5, equivalent to 10 current on-board AI4 chips per single chip. The power consumption is only one-third of comparable NVIDIA AI accelerators at equivalent computing output, due to optimized transistor layout and AI accelerator unit arrangement. AI6 will be manufactured at Samsung's Taylor, Texas fab with planned initial monthly capacity of 16,000 wafers, scalable to 40,000. The chip targets a unified hardware foundation connecting passenger vehicles, robotaxi services, humanoid robots, and AI training supercomputing clusters.
key_points: 特斯拉第六代自研AI芯片AI6已完成全部工程评审，进入流片前定型阶段。采用三星2nm GAA工艺，算力在AI5基础上翻倍，等效10块当前车载AI4芯片，计划2028年下半年投产。
key_points_en: AI6 chip uses Samsung 2nm GAA process with $16.5B exclusive supply contract through 2033
Computing power doubles compared to AI5, equivalent to 10 current AI4 chips; power consumption only 1/3 of comparable NVIDIA chips
Production timeline: humanoid robots and Dojo supercomputer first (2028 H2), Cybercab fleet second, consumer vehicles post-2030
AI6.5 iteration planned for TSMC Arizona factory, establishing dual advanced process supply chain

articles.title: 谷歌TPU硬刚英伟达GPU：50亿美元合作打造AI云第二条路
articles.title_en: Google TPU Challenges NVIDIA GPU: $5B Partnership to Build AI Cloud Alternative
articles.summary: 谷歌与黑石集团达成50亿美元合作，计划基于TPU打造新型AI数据中心和算力服务，目标与CoreWeave、Nebius等英伟达核心新云厂商竞争。TPU正从内部武器转向外部商业化。
articles.summary_en: Google and Blackstone partner on $5 billion to build TPU-based AI data centers and computing services, competing with NVIDIA-centric new cloud providers like CoreWeave and Nebius. TPU is transforming from internal asset to external commercial product.
articles.content: 谷歌与黑石集团达成50亿美元合作，计划基于TPU打造新型AI数据中心和算力服务，目标与CoreWeave、Nebius等英伟达核心新云厂商竞争。TPU正从内部武器转向外部商业化。
articles.content_en: Google and Blackstone announced a $5 billion partnership to develop TPU-based AI data centers and computing services, marking Google's most aggressive move to commercialize its custom AI chips. Under the partnership, Google's parent company has provided approximately $3.2 billion in financial guarantees for an AI data center project in Lake Mariner, New York, with computing power to be rented to Anthropic. Similar guarantees include $7 billion for the River Bend project in Louisiana and $1.4 billion for Colorado City in Texas. Citadel Securities has already begun using TPUs for some research software workloads, reporting significant cost reductions and speed improvements. Google's latest TPU generation is clearly divided into two lines: TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, reflecting the industry's shift from training-first to inference-intensive AI workloads. This move follows NVIDIA's playbook of using financial guarantees to amplify demand and lock in customers.

hero.title: 苹果WWDC 2026：Siri底层全面切换Gemini，AI助手进入「自选模型」时代
hero.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Switches to Gemini, AI Assistants Enter 'Choose Your Own Model' Era
hero.summary: 苹果WWDC 2026重磅宣布Siri底层AI引擎全面切换至Google Gemini，用户可在Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude三选一。苹果成为全球首个允许用户「自选模型」的消费级平台，标志着从「一款模型」到「模型商店」的范式转变。
hero.summary_en: Apple WWDC 2026 announces Siri's complete AI engine switch to Google Gemini, with users able to choose between Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. Apple becomes the first consumer platform to offer 'choose your own AI model,' marking a paradigm shift from 'one model' to 'model store.'
hero.content:
6月19日，苹果WWDC 2026正式发布Siri的重大战略转型——底层AI引擎全面切换至Google Gemini（1.2万亿参数）。

用户可以在Gemini、ChatGPT、Claude三个顶级AI模型中自由选择，苹果成为全球首个允许用户「自选模型」的消费级平台。

Gemini作为Siri默认引擎，标志着苹果与Google的合作从搜索引擎延伸至AI领域。ChatGPT和Claude作为备选，用户可在设置中一键切换。

这一改变意味着：消费级AI产品正式从「厂商绑定」走向「用户自主选择」，AI平台的「操作系统化」趋势加速。
hero.content_en:
June 19, Apple WWDC 2026 officially announced Siri's major strategic transformation — the underlying AI engine fully switches to Google Gemini (1.2 trillion parameters).

Users can freely choose between three top-tier AI models: Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. Apple becomes the world's first consumer platform allowing users to 'choose their own model.'

Gemini as Siri's default engine marks Apple's partnership with Google extending from search engines to AI. ChatGPT and Claude serve as alternatives, switchable with one tap.

This change signifies: consumer AI products officially moving from 'vendor lock-in' to 'user autonomy,' and the 'operating system-ization' of AI platforms accelerates.
key_points: Siri底层全面切换Gemini（1.2万亿参数）
用户可在Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude三选一
苹果成为首个允许「自选模型」的消费级平台
Gemini成为Siri默认引擎
AI产品从「厂商绑定」走向「用户自主选择」
key_points_en: Siri fully switches to Gemini (1.2 trillion parameters)
Users can choose between Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude
Apple becomes first consumer platform with 'choose your own model'
Gemini becomes Siri's default engine
AI products shift from 'vendor lock-in' to 'user autonomy'

articles.content:

articles.content_en:
An AI research team announced their AI system independently completed a major scientific discovery published in Nature — discovering a new protein folding pattern with potential for developing treatments for Parkinson's and other neurodegenerative diseases.

This is the first time humanity has verified that AI can complete major scientific breakthroughs without human leadership, marking a fundamental shift in the role of AI scientists.

hero.title: Transformer之父Noam Shazeer跳槽OpenAI，大模型架构战再升级
hero.title_en: Transformer Co-Author Noam Shazeer Jumps to OpenAI, Architecture War Escalates
hero.summary: Transformer论文作者之一、谷歌DeepMind工程副总裁兼Gemini联合负责人Noam Shazeer正式宣布离开谷歌加入OpenAI，担任架构研究负责人。这是继前Gemini产品负责人后，谷歌AI团队又一核心人才流失，标志着大模型架构探索战再度升级。同日，WAIC 2026确认7月17-20日在上海举办，超300款AI产品全球首发。
hero.summary_en: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the Transformer paper, Google DeepMind VP of Engineering and Gemini co-lead, officially announced his departure from Google to join OpenAI as Head of Architecture Research. This marks another core talent loss for Google's AI team, signaling an escalation in the battle for next-generation model architecture.
hero.content:
6月18日，AI行业上演了一场震动硅谷的「人才地震」——Transformer论文作者之一、谷歌DeepMind工程副总裁兼Gemini联合负责人Noam Shazeer正式宣布离开谷歌、加入OpenAI，将担任架构研究负责人。

Shazeer是2017年Transformer论文「Attention Is All You Need」的核心作者之一，在谷歌主导了多个大模型项目。他的离开被视为谷歌AI人才流失的标志性事件，也意味着OpenAI在下一代模型架构上获得了关键人才。

同日，国务院新闻办公室披露WAIC 2026将于7月17-20日在上海举办，超300款AI产品全球首发；上交所将科创板第五套上市标准扩至AI大模型企业，资本市场反应积极。
hero.content_en:
On June 18, the AI industry witnessed a 'talent earthquake' rocking Silicon Valley: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the Transformer paper and Google DeepMind's VP of Engineering, officially announced his departure from Google to join OpenAI as Head of Architecture Research.

Shazeer was one of the core authors of the 2017 'Attention Is All You Need' paper and led multiple large model projects at Google. His departure is seen as a landmark event in Google's AI talent drain, and means OpenAI has acquired key talent for next-generation model architecture.

hero.title: FF发布全尺寸人形机器人Futurist 2，贾跃亭跨界入局具身智能
hero.title_en: FF Unveils Full-Size Humanoid Robot Futurist 2, Jia Yueting Embarks on Embodied AI
hero.summary: 贾跃亭于6月17日正式发布FF Futurist 2全尺寸人形机器人，标志着电动汽车厂商全面进入人形机器人赛道。Futurist 2采用自研「神经元控制引擎」，支持双足直立行走与全地形适应。同时，智源大会共识显示未来2-3年是具身智能商用关键窗口，资本端白热化——百亿估值已成为新常态，400亿估值也浮出水面。
hero.summary_en: Jia Yueting officially released FF Futurist 2 full-size humanoid robot on June 17, marking EV manufacturers' full entry into humanoid robotics. Futurist 2 features self-developed 'Neural Control Engine' supporting bipedal upright walking and all-terrain adaptation. Meanwhile, Zhiyuan Conference consensus shows 2-3 years as key window for embodied AI commercialization, with capital heating up — $10B+ valuations becoming new normal and $40B valuations emerging.
hero.source: 财新网 / 钛媒体 / 凤凰科技
hero.content:
6月17日，FF（Faraday Future）正式发布Futurist 2全尺寸人形机器人，标志着这家电动汽车厂商正式跨界进入人形机器人赛道。

Futurist 2采用FF自研的「神经元控制引擎」，支持双足直立行走与全地形适应，可实现复杂动作的自主规划与执行。贾跃亭在发布会上表示：「人形机器人是下一个万亿级赛道，FF不仅要造车，更要造人。」

这一发布紧随行业共识。在北京智源大会上，银河通用创始人王鹤、星海图等头部创业者一致判断：未来2-3年是具身智能走向规模化商用的关键期。产业端「窗口期」共识正在形成，技术突破和商业落地的时间差越来越短。

资本层面同样白热化。据财新报道：千寻智能2个月内完成三轮融资，估值超百亿元；灵心巧手近期寻求400亿元估值新一轮融资。创业密度在「上桌or出局」的紧迫感下急剧攀升。

FF等跨界入局者的出现进一步验证了赛道热度已从垂直领域扩散到全科技行业。人形机器人正从实验室走向真实场景，从技术demo走向生产环境验证。
hero.content_en:
On June 17, FF (Faraday Future) officially released Futurist 2 full-size humanoid robot, marking the EV manufacturer's formal entry into the humanoid robotics sector.

Futurist 2 features FF's self-developed 'Neural Control Engine' supporting bipedal upright walking and all-terrain adaptation, enabling autonomous planning and execution of complex actions. Jia Yueting stated at the launch: 'Humanoid robots are the next trillion-dollar track. FF not only builds cars, but also builds humans.'

This release follows industry consensus. At the Beijing Zhiyuan Conference, founders of leading companies like Galaxy General and Xinghaitu agreed: the next 2-3 years are the critical window for embodied AI commercialization. Industry consensus on the 'window period' is forming, with the time gap between technological breakthroughs and commercial deployment shrinking.

The capital side is equally heating up. According to Caixin: Qianxun Intelligence completed three financing rounds in two months with valuation over 10 billion RMB; Lingxinqiaoshou is seeking new funding at 40 billion RMB valuation. Startup density is climbing sharply under the urgency of 'get to the table or exit'.

The emergence of cross-border entrants like FF further validates that track popularity has spread from vertical sectors to the entire tech industry. Humanoid robots are moving from labs to real scenes, from technical demos to production environment validation.

贾跃亭跨界入局具身智能赛道
智源大会共识2-3年为商用关键窗口
千寻智能估值超百亿
灵心巧手寻求400亿估值融资
创业密度急剧攀升
key_points_en: FF releases Futurist 2 full-size humanoid robot
Jia Yueting enters embodied AI sector
Zhiyuan Conference: 2-3 years as commercialization window
Qianxun Intelligence valuation over 10B RMB
Lingxinqiaoshou seeking 40B RMB valuation funding
Startup density climbing sharply

articles.title: OpenAI收购Ona，AI编程智能体跨入「持久自主工作」时代
articles.title_en: OpenAI Acquires Ona, AI Coding Agents Enter 'Persistent Autonomous Work' Era
articles.summary: OpenAI于6月11日宣布收购云开发环境公司Ona，为Codex智能体提供安全、持久的云工作空间，支持跨小时甚至跨天持续运行。这是AI编程从「瞬时代码补全」向「长期自主智能体」转变的标志性事件。同期，OpenAI于6月8日向SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请，IPO进程提速。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI announced acquisition of cloud development environment company Ona on June 11, providing safe, persistent cloud workspaces for Codex agents, supporting continuous operation across hours or even days. This is a landmark event marking AI programming's shift from 'instant code completion' to 'long-term autonomous agents.' Simultaneously, OpenAI submitted confidential S-1 IPO filing to SEC on June 8, accelerating IPO timeline.
articles.content:
OpenAI正在重新定义AI编程智能体的边界。

6月11日，OpenAI宣布收购云开发环境公司Ona，为Codex智能体提供安全、持久的云工作空间。这意味着Codex不再只是帮你写几行代码，而是可以在企业环境中持续运行数天、访问内部系统、完成完整开发任务。

这一收购标志着AI编程从「瞬时代码补全」向「长期自主智能体」转变的标志性事件。Codex将能够跨小时甚至跨天持续运行，真正实现「持久自主工作」。

与此同时，OpenAI的商业化进程也在加速。6月8日，OpenAI向SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请，IPO进程提速。6月10日，OpenAI与Oracle达成合作，企业可通过Oracle Universal Credits直接采购Codex和模型服务，大幅降低了企业客户的使用门槛。

对于企业而言，这意味着AI编程智能体正在从实验性工具转变为生产级基础设施。当智能体可以持续运行数天完成完整开发任务时，软件开发的工作流程将发生根本性改变。
articles.content_en:
OpenAI is redefining the boundaries of AI coding agents.

On June 11, OpenAI announced the acquisition of cloud development environment company Ona, providing safe, persistent cloud workspaces for Codex agents. This means Codex is no longer just helping you write a few lines of code, but can run continuously for days in enterprise environments, access internal systems, and complete full development tasks.

This acquisition marks a landmark event in the transition from 'instant code completion' to 'long-term autonomous agents' in AI programming. Codex will be able to run continuously across hours or even days, truly achieving 'persistent autonomous work'.

Simultaneously, OpenAI's commercialization process is accelerating. On June 8, OpenAI submitted a confidential S-1 IPO filing to SEC, accelerating the IPO timeline. On June 10, OpenAI partnered with Oracle, enabling enterprises to purchase Codex and model services directly through Oracle Universal Credits, significantly lowering barriers for enterprise customers.

For enterprises, this means AI coding agents are transitioning from experimental tools to production-grade infrastructure. When agents can run continuously for days completing full development tasks, software development workflows will undergo fundamental change.
key_points_en: OpenAI acquires Ona for persistent cloud workspaces
Codex agents can now run continuously across hours or days
Shift from instant code completion to long-term autonomous agents
OpenAI submitted S-1 IPO filing to SEC on June 8

articles.title: Anthropic Agent SDK计费独立，JFrog集成供应链安全
articles.title_en: Anthropic Agent SDK Billing Separates, JFrog Integrates Supply Chain Security
articles.summary: 6月15日起，Anthropic正式将程序化智能体使用从交互订阅中独立出来，Pro用户每月获20美元Agent SDK额度，Max 5x获100美元/月，超额按API费率计费。JFrog同期发布Claude Code插件，将软件供应链安全治理直接嵌入AI编程智能体的执行流程。
articles.summary_en: Starting June 15, Anthropic officially separated programmatic agent usage from interactive subscriptions, with Pro users receiving $20 Agent SDK monthly allowance and Max 5x receiving $100/month, with overage billed at API rates. JFrog simultaneously released Claude Code plugin, embedding software supply chain security governance directly into AI coding agent execution workflows.
articles.source_en: Anthropic Help Center / JFrog press release
articles.content:
Anthropic正在推动AI编程智能体从「实验性尝鲜」进入「生产级工程化」阶段。

6月15日起，Anthropic正式将程序化智能体使用从交互订阅中独立出来。Pro用户每月获20美元Agent SDK额度，Max 5x获100美元/月，超额按API费率计费。

这一计费独立标志着企业必须区分实验预算和生产预算。当智能体在生产环境中持续运行时，其成本模型与普通对话完全不同，企业需要建立新的预算管理体系。

与此同时，JFrog发布Claude Code插件，将软件供应链安全治理（构件扫描、依赖白名单、MCP注册审批）直接嵌入AI编程智能体的执行流程。

这代表了安全基础设施与AI编程智能体深度绑定的趋势。任何涉及构建和部署的AI智能体都必须通过合规检查，这将成为企业级标配。

对于企业而言，这意味着AI编程智能体不再是独立的工具，而是整个DevSecOps流程的一部分。安全、合规、质量管控将成为智能体开发流程的内置环节。
articles.content_en:
Anthropic is driving AI coding agents from 'experimental trials' into 'production-grade engineering' stage.

Starting June 15, Anthropic officially separated programmatic agent usage from interactive subscriptions. Pro users receive $20 Agent SDK monthly allowance, Max 5x receives $100/month, with overage billed at API rates.

This billing independence marks that enterprises must distinguish between experimental and production budgets. When agents run continuously in production environments, their cost model is completely different from ordinary conversations, requiring enterprises to establish new budget management systems.

Simultaneously, JFrog released Claude Code plugin, embedding software supply chain security governance (artifact scanning, dependency whitelisting, MCP registration approval) directly into AI coding agent execution workflows.

This represents the trend of deep binding between security infrastructure and AI coding agents. Any agent involving build and deployment must pass compliance checks, which will become enterprise-grade standard.

For enterprises, this means AI coding agents are no longer independent tools, but part of the entire DevSecOps process. Security, compliance, and quality control will become built-in elements of the agent development process.
key_points_en: Anthropic separates Agent SDK billing from interactive subscriptions
Pro users get $20/month, Max 5x gets $100/month agent allowance
JFrog releases Claude Code plugin for supply chain security

articles.title: MiniMax M3开源，高速版Kimi K2.7 Code提升5-6倍输出速度
articles.title_en: MiniMax M3 Open Source, Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed Version Boosts Output 5-6x
articles.summary: Moonshot AI发布了Kimi K2.7 Code高速版，面向开发者和企业API用户。该版本在标准版基础上通过技术优化实现5-6倍的输出速度提升，短任务可达260 tokens/秒，平均编程任务达180 tokens/秒。定价为标准版的两倍。招商银行同期推出「运通工程师信用卡」，新用户单月可享18亿Token M3用量。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed version for developers and enterprise API users. Through technical optimizations on the standard version, it achieves 5-6x output speed improvement, reaching 260 tokens/sec for short tasks and 180 tokens/sec for average coding tasks. Priced at double the standard version. China Merchants Bank simultaneously launched 'American Express Engineer Credit Card' with new users enjoying 1.8 billion tokens/month M3 usage.
articles.content:
AI编程模型的速度竞赛正在白热化。

Moonshot AI发布了Kimi K2.7 Code高速版，这是面向开发者和企业API用户的专业版本。该版本在标准版基础上通过技术优化实现了5-6倍的输出速度提升。

具体性能数据：短任务可达260 tokens/秒，平均编程任务达180 tokens/秒。这一性能提升将显著改善开发者的工作流程，特别是在需要快速迭代的场景中。

当然，性能提升也是有代价的。Kimi K2.7 Code高速版的定价为标准版的两倍，这反映了高性能计算的成本压力。

与此同时，招商银行推出「运通工程师信用卡」，新用户办卡可提供「专属AI权益」，单月可享18亿Token的M3用量。这标志着金融机构正在将AI服务权益融入金融产品，开辟了AI商业化新模式。

新用户根据开发需求获得不同层级的AI算力额度，从专业级并发智能体支持到标准使用，不一而足。这种将AI算力权益融入金融产品的趋势，正在成为AI商业化的新路径。
articles.content_en:
The speed race in AI coding models is heating up.

Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed version, a professional version for developers and enterprise API users. Through technical optimizations on the standard version, it achieves 5-6x output speed improvement.

Specific performance data: short tasks reach 260 tokens/sec, average coding tasks reach 180 tokens/sec. This performance improvement will significantly enhance developer workflows, especially in scenarios requiring rapid iteration.

Of course, performance improvements come at a cost. Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed is priced at double the standard version, reflecting the cost pressures of high-performance computing.

Simultaneously, China Merchants Bank launched 'American Express Engineer Credit Card' providing 'exclusive AI benefits' for new users, with single-month M3 usage of 1.8 billion tokens. This marks financial institutions integrating AI service benefits into financial products, opening new AI monetization models.

New users receive different tiers of AI compute quotas based on development needs, from professional-grade concurrent agent support to standard usage. This trend of integrating AI compute benefits into financial products is becoming a new path for AI commercialization.
key_points_en: Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed achieves 5-6x output speed improvement
Reaches 260 tokens/sec for short tasks, 180 tokens/sec for coding
Priced at double the standard version

articles.title: 苹果探索AI智能体让Siri自主操作iPhone和Mac软件
articles.title_en: Apple Explores AI Agents for Siri to Autonomously Control iPhone and Mac Software
articles.summary: Bloomberg记者Mark Gurman报道，苹果正在探索AI智能体技术，让Siri能够自主控制iPhone、iPad和Mac上的软件。虽然目前仍处于推测阶段，但苹果现代化Siri底层架构以及高管对未来能力扩展的评论支持了这一潜在转变。苹果目前专注于基于LLM的Siri重构，但已暗示未来可能转向智能体工作流。
articles.summary_en: Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman reports Apple is exploring AI agent technology to enable Siri to autonomously control software across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. While currently speculative, the potential shift is supported by Apple's modernization of Siri's underlying architecture and executive comments about future capability expansion. Apple currently focuses on LLM-based Siri reconstruction but has hinted at potential future move toward agentic workflows.
articles.content:
苹果正在探索Siri的下一个重大进化。

Bloomberg记者Mark Gurman报道，苹果正在探索AI智能体技术，让Siri能够自主控制iPhone、iPad和Mac上的软件。这将标志着Siri从被动响应转向主动执行。

虽然目前仍处于推测阶段，但苹果现代化Siri底层架构以及高管对未来能力扩展的评论支持了这一潜在转变。苹果目前专注于基于LLM的Siri重构，但已暗示未来可能转向智能体工作流。

这一探索紧随WWDC 2026上苹果发布的Foundation Models框架，该框架允许iOS应用在设备上直接运行AI模型，无需将数据发送到云端。

AI智能体时代的到来意味着Siri将不再只是一个语音助手，而是一个能够理解用户意图、自主执行复杂任务的智能代理。这可能涉及跨应用的自动化操作、复杂的任务规划和执行，以及更加自然的交互体验。

对于苹果而言，这是其AI战略的重要一步。设备端AI优先、隐私保护与强大智能体能力的结合，将使苹果在AI竞争中占据独特优势。
articles.content_en:
Apple is exploring Siri's next major evolution.

Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman reports Apple is exploring AI agent technology to enable Siri to autonomously control software across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. This marks Siri's shift from passive response to active execution.

While currently speculative, Apple's modernization of Siri's underlying architecture and executive comments about future capability expansion support this potential shift. Apple currently focuses on LLM-based Siri reconstruction but has hinted at potential future move toward agentic workflows.

This exploration follows Apple's Foundation Models framework released at WWDC 2026, which allows iOS apps to run AI models directly on device without sending data to the cloud.

The arrival of the AI agent era means Siri will no longer be just a voice assistant, but an intelligent agent capable of understanding user intent and autonomously executing complex tasks. This may involve cross-app automation, complex task planning and execution, and more natural interaction experiences.

For Apple, this is an important step in its AI strategy. The combination of on-device AI priority, privacy protection, and powerful agent capabilities will give Apple unique advantages in AI competition.
key_points_en: Apple exploring AI agent technology for Siri to autonomously control software
Potential shift affects iPhone, iPad, and Mac
Part of Apple's broader LLM-based Siri reconstruction effort

articles.title: 亚马逊拟投资数十亿美元建密苏里州数据中心
articles.title_en: Amazon Plans Multi-Billion Dollar Investment in Missouri Data Center
articles.summary: 亚马逊宣布将在密苏里州蒙哥马利县投资「数十亿美元」建设新的数据中心园区，推进AI与云计算扩张布局。预计将创造400多个全职岗位及数千个施工岗位，涵盖道路、供水与数字化通信设施。这是2026年以来美国头部云厂「千亿级算力重资产」周期的延续。
articles.summary_en: Amazon announced plans to invest 'multi-billion dollars' in a new data-center campus in Montgomery County, Missouri, advancing AI and cloud expansion. Expected to create over 400 full-time jobs and thousands of construction jobs, covering roads, water supply, and digital communications facilities. This extends the 2026 cycle of 'hundred-billion-dollar compute capex' by US hyperscalers.
articles.content:
美国AI基础设施投资正在加速。

6月16日，亚马逊宣布将在密苏里州蒙哥马利县投资「数十亿美元」建设新的数据中心园区，推进AI与云计算扩张布局。

该项目预计将创造400多个全职岗位及数千个施工岗位，涵盖道路、供水与数字化通信设施。这是2026年以来美国头部云厂「千亿级算力重资产」周期的延续。

此前，Google月均支付9.2亿美元租用xAI算力，Apollo/Blackstone为Anthropic设计350亿美元融资方案，Alphabet筹集850亿美元创纪录资金。这些巨额投资正在重塑全球AI竞争格局。

AI算力需求正在以前所未有的速度增长。随着大模型规模不断扩大、AI应用场景持续扩展，数据中心成为AI竞争的核心基础设施。

对于亚马逊而言，这笔投资不仅是扩大云服务产能，更是为未来的AI需求储备算力。在AI军备竞赛中，谁拥有足够的算力基础设施，谁就拥有了更大的战略主动权。
articles.content_en:
US AI infrastructure investment is accelerating.

On June 16, Amazon announced plans to invest 'multi-billion dollars' in a new data-center campus in Montgomery County, Missouri, advancing AI and cloud expansion.

The project is expected to create over 400 full-time jobs and thousands of construction jobs, covering roads, water supply, and digital communications facilities. This extends the 2026 cycle of 'hundred-billion-dollar compute capex' by US hyperscalers.

Previously, Google paid $920M/month on average to lease xAI compute, Apollo/Blackstone designed a $35B financing package for Anthropic, and Alphabet raised a record $85B. These massive investments are reshaping the global AI competition landscape.

AI compute demand is growing at unprecedented speed. With large model scale continuously expanding and AI application scenarios persistently growing, data centers have become the core infrastructure of AI competition.

For Amazon, this investment is not only expanding cloud service capacity, but also reserving compute for future AI demand. In the AI arms race, whoever possesses sufficient compute infrastructure possesses greater strategic initiative.
key_points_en: Amazon investing multi-billion dollars in Missouri data center campus
Expected to create over 400 full-time jobs
Extends 2026 cycle of hundred-billion-dollar compute capex by US hyperscalers

articles.title: OpenAI承诺2026年向AI非营利问题投资5000万美元
articles.title_en: OpenAI Pledges $50M for AI Non-Profit Issues in 2026
articles.summary: OpenAI于6月15日承诺在2026年对与AI相关的非营利问题投入5000万美元，覆盖AI安全、滥用治理、AI for Good等领域。这被视为头部模型公司在监管收紧背景下的「社会契约」加码。AI公司正在通过主动履行社会责任来回应监管关切，建立与政府和公众的信任。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI pledged $50 million in 2026 for AI-related non-profit work on June 15, covering AI safety, misuse governance, and AI for Good. This is viewed as leading model companies' 'social contract' deepening amid tightening regulation. AI companies are responding to regulatory concerns and building trust with governments and the public through proactive fulfillment of social responsibilities.
articles.content:
AI公司正在主动承担社会责任。

OpenAI于6月15日承诺在2026年对与AI相关的非营利问题投入5000万美元，覆盖AI安全、滥用治理、AI for Good等领域。

这一承诺被视为头部模型公司在监管收紧背景下的「社会契约」加码。随着AI监管在全球范围内不断收紧，AI公司正在通过主动履行社会责任来回应监管关切，建立与政府和公众的信任。

5000万美元的投入虽然相对于OpenAI的融资规模不算巨大，但其象征意义重大。这表明OpenAI认识到AI技术的社会影响已经超出了纯商业范畴，需要更多关注公共利益。

AI安全问题、滥用治理、AI for Good——这些领域虽然短期商业回报有限，但对于AI行业的长期健康发展至关重要。OpenAI的承诺为行业树立了一个标杆。

其他AI公司很可能跟进，形成一种行业共识：在追求商业成功的同时，也要关注技术的社会影响，承担相应的社会责任。这将有助于缓解监管压力，赢得公众信任。
articles.content_en:
AI companies are proactively taking on social responsibilities.

OpenAI pledged $50 million in 2026 for AI-related non-profit work on June 15, covering AI safety, misuse governance, and AI for Good.

This commitment is viewed as leading model companies' 'social contract' deepening amid tightening regulation. With AI regulation continuously tightening globally, AI companies are responding to regulatory concerns and building trust with governments and the public through proactive fulfillment of social responsibilities.

While the $50 million investment is not massive relative to OpenAI's financing scale, its symbolic significance is significant. This shows OpenAI recognizes that AI's social impact has gone beyond pure commercial scope and requires more attention to public interests.

AI safety, misuse governance, AI for Good — while these areas may have limited short-term commercial returns, they are crucial for the long-term healthy development of the AI industry. OpenAI's commitment sets a benchmark for the industry.

Other AI companies will likely follow, forming an industry consensus: while pursuing commercial success, we must also focus on technology's social impact and assume corresponding social responsibilities. This will help alleviate regulatory pressure and win public trust.
key_points_en: OpenAI pledges $50 million in 2026 for AI non-profit work
Covers AI safety, misuse governance, and AI for Good
Viewed as leading model companies' 'social contract' deepening

articles.title: 智谱GLM-5.2全量用户开放，港股两日累涨超35%
articles.title_en: Zhipu GLM-5.2 Fully Open to Users, Hong Kong Stock Up 35% in Two Days
articles.summary: 智谱AI宣布GLM-5.2全量用户开放，即将开源API。这一消息触发资本市场强烈反应，智谱港股在两个交易日内累计涨幅超过35%。GLM-5.2提供了更大的上下文窗口和更强的推理能力，被视为中国大模型领域的重大突破。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5.2 fully open to all users, with open-source API coming soon. This news triggered strong market reaction, with Zhipu's Hong Kong stock rising over 35% in two trading days. GLM-5.2 provides larger context window and stronger reasoning capabilities, viewed as a major breakthrough in China's LLM field.
articles.content:
中国大模型领域迎来重大突破。

智谱AI宣布GLM-5.2全量用户开放，即将开源API。这一消息触发资本市场强烈反应，智谱港股在两个交易日内累计涨幅超过35%。

GLM-5.2是智谱AI的最新一代大模型，提供了更大的上下文窗口和更强的推理能力。用户反馈显示，该模型在代码生成、数学推理、长文本处理等关键任务上表现优异。

即将开源API的决定更是引发行业关注。开源将大大降低开发者的使用门槛，加速AI应用的普及。对于中国AI生态而言，这是一个重要的里程碑。

资本市场的热烈反应反映了投资者对中国大模型产业的信心。在全球AI竞争格局中，中国公司正在快速追赶，GLM-5.2的表现是一个有力证明。

随着更多中国大模型的成熟和开源，全球AI生态正在变得更加多元化。这对整个行业来说是一个积极信号，将促进技术创新和竞争。
articles.content_en:
China's LLM field welcomes a major breakthrough.

Zhipu AI announced GLM-5.2 fully open to all users, with open-source API coming soon. This news triggered strong market reaction, with Zhipu's Hong Kong stock rising over 35% in two trading days.

GLM-5.2 is Zhipu AI's latest generation large model, providing larger context window and stronger reasoning capabilities. User feedback shows the model performs excellently on key tasks like code generation, mathematical reasoning, and long-text processing.

The upcoming open-source API decision attracts industry attention. Open sourcing will significantly lower barriers for developers and accelerate AI application adoption. For China's AI ecosystem, this is an important milestone.

The capital market's enthusiastic reaction reflects investor confidence in China's LLM industry. In the global AI competitive landscape, Chinese companies are rapidly catching up, and GLM-5.2's performance is strong proof.

With more Chinese large models maturing and open-sourcing, the global AI ecosystem is becoming more diverse. This is a positive signal for the entire industry, promoting technological innovation and competition.
key_points_en: GLM-5.2 fully open to all users with open-source API coming soon
Zhipu's Hong Kong stock rises over 35% in two trading days
Major breakthrough in China's LLM field

articles.title: 燧原科技科创板IPO过会，拟募资60亿元投向AI芯片研发
articles.title_en: Suiyuan Technology Passes STAR Market IPO Review, Raising 6 Billion RMB for AI Chip R&D
articles.summary: 国产AI芯片厂商燧原科技科创板IPO过会，拟募资60亿元，投向第五代、第六代AI芯片研发及产业化。这是中国AI芯片产业的重要里程碑。随着AI算力需求爆发式增长，国产AI芯片正在加速追赶国际领先水平。
articles.summary_en: Domestic AI chip vendor Suiyuan Technology passed STAR Market IPO review, planning to raise 6 billion RMB for 5th and 6th generation AI chip R&D and industrialization. This is an important milestone for China's AI chip industry. With explosive growth in AI compute demand, domestic AI chips are accelerating to catch up with international leading levels.
articles.content:
中国AI芯片产业迎来重要突破。

国产AI芯片厂商燧原科技科创板IPO过会，拟募资60亿元，投向第五代、第六代AI芯片研发及产业化。这是中国AI芯片产业的重要里程碑。

燧原科技是中国AI芯片领域的领军企业之一，其产品已在多个数据中心和AI应用场景中部署。此次IPO过会意味着公司即将获得更多资金支持，加速技术研发和产业化进程。

60亿元的募资金额将主要用于第五代、第六代AI芯片的研发。随着AI算力需求爆发式增长，新一代AI芯片需要提供更高的性能、更低的功耗和更好的成本效益。

这一IPO也反映了中国资本对AI芯片产业的信心。在全球AI竞争格局中，算力基础设施是核心竞争力之一。中国正在通过资本市场加速本土AI芯片产业发展，减少对进口芯片的依赖。

随着更多中国AI芯片公司走向资本市场，整个产业链将获得更多资源支持，加速技术创新和产业升级。
articles.content_en:
China's AI chip industry welcomes an important breakthrough.

Domestic AI chip vendor Suiyuan Technology passed STAR Market IPO review, planning to raise 6 billion RMB for 5th and 6th generation AI chip R&D and industrialization. This is an important milestone for China's AI chip industry.

Suiyuan Technology is one of the leading companies in China's AI chip field, with products already deployed in multiple data centers and AI application scenarios. This IPO review means the company will soon obtain more financial support to accelerate technology R&D and industrialization.

The 6 billion RMB fundraising will mainly be used for 5th and 6th generation AI chip R&D. With explosive growth in AI compute demand, new generation AI chips need to provide higher performance, lower power consumption, and better cost-effectiveness.

This IPO also reflects Chinese capital's confidence in the AI chip industry. In the global AI competitive landscape, compute infrastructure is one of the core competitiveness. China is accelerating本土 AI chip industry development through capital markets, reducing dependence on imported chips.

With more Chinese AI chip companies going to capital markets, the entire industry chain will receive more resource support, accelerating technological innovation and industrial upgrading.
key_points_en: Suiyuan Technology passes STAR Market IPO review
Planning to raise 6 billion RMB for AI chip R&D
Important milestone for China's AI chip industry

articles.title: 微纳核芯完成超10亿元人民币B轮系列融资
articles.title_en: Weina Core Completes Over 1 Billion RMB Series B Funding
articles.summary: 国产AI芯片公司微纳核芯完成超10亿元人民币B轮系列融资，本轮融资由中国移动链长基金等领投。微纳核芯的3D-CIM架构为全球首创，在存算一体领域具有领先优势。这是中国存算一体芯片领域的重要融资案例。
articles.summary_en: Domestic AI chip company Weina Core completed over 1 billion RMB Series B financing, led by China Mobile Chain Leader Fund. Weina Core's 3D-CIM architecture is globally pioneering, with leading advantages in compute-in-memory field. This is an important financing case in China's compute-in-memory chip field.
articles.content:
存算一体芯片领域迎来重要融资。

国产AI芯片公司微纳核芯完成超10亿元人民币B轮系列融资，本轮融资由中国移动链长基金等领投。

微纳核芯的3D-CIM（Compute-In-Memory）架构为全球首创，在存算一体领域具有领先优势。存算一体技术通过将计算和存储融合，大幅提升了AI计算效率，降低了功耗和延迟。

这轮融资反映了中国资本对存算一体芯片领域的重视。随着AI算力需求持续增长，传统的冯·诺依曼架构已经难以满足需求，存算一体等新型计算架构正在成为重要方向。

中国移动链长基金的参与具有战略意义。作为通信基础设施运营商，中国移动对AI算力的需求巨大，投资存算一体芯片有助于其构建自主可控的AI基础设施。

随着更多资本涌入存算一体芯片领域，这一技术路线有望加速成熟，为AI算力瓶颈提供解决方案。
articles.content_en:
Compute-in-memory chip field welcomes important financing.

Domestic AI chip company Weina Core completed over 1 billion RMB Series B financing, led by China Mobile Chain Leader Fund.

Weina Core's 3D-CIM (Compute-In-Memory) architecture is globally pioneering, with leading advantages in compute-in-memory field. Compute-in-memory technology integrates computation and storage, significantly improving AI computing efficiency while reducing power consumption and latency.

This financing reflects Chinese capital's emphasis on compute-in-memory chip field. With AI compute demand continuously growing, traditional von Neumann architecture struggles to meet requirements, and new computing architectures like compute-in-memory are becoming important directions.

China Mobile Chain Leader Fund's participation has strategic significance. As a communications infrastructure operator, China Mobile has enormous AI compute needs, and investing in compute-in-memory chips helps build autonomous AI infrastructure.

With more capital flowing into compute-in-memory chip field, this technology route is expected to accelerate maturation, providing solutions for AI compute bottlenecks.
key_points_en: Weina Core completes over 1 billion RMB Series B financing
Led by China Mobile Chain Leader Fund
3D-CIM architecture is globally pioneering in compute-in-memory field

articles.title: 工信部+国资委联合启动人形机器人实景实训专项行动
articles.title_en: MIIT & SASAC Jointly Launch Humanoid Robot Practical Training Initiative
articles.summary: 工信部与国资委联合印发通知，正式启动2026年度人形机器人与具身智能实景实训专项行动。聚焦工业、服务、特种三大场景，部署打造实景实训空间、组建创新应用联合体、攻关实用化作业技能等六大任务。目标到2026年底，人形机器人在代表性场景完成应用验证和常态部署。
articles.summary_en: MIIT and SASAC jointly issued a notice officially launching the 2026 Humanoid Robot and Embodied Intelligence Practical Training Initiative. Focusing on industrial, service, and special scenarios, deploying six tasks including building practical training spaces, forming innovation application consortiums, and tackling practical skills. Goal: by end of 2026, humanoid robots complete application verification and normal deployment in representative scenarios.
articles.source: 工信部通知 / 中国新闻网
articles.content:
国家层面首次系统推动人形机器人从实验室走向真实场景。

6月9日，工信部与国资委联合印发通知，正式启动2026年度人形机器人与具身智能实景实训专项行动。

专项行动聚焦工业、服务、特种三大场景，部署打造实景实训空间、组建创新应用联合体、攻关实用化作业技能等六大任务。

目标到2026年底，人形机器人在代表性场景完成应用验证和常态部署，凝练百个以上高价值应用案例，构建「实景实训—数据沉淀—产品迭代—规模部署」产业闭环。

这是国家层面首次以如此高规格（工信部+国资委双部委）系统性推动人形机器人从实验室走向真实场景。政策明确「以场景牵引产业」，意味着不再停留在技术demo阶段，而是进入真刀真枪的生产环境验证。

资本市场已快速反应——6月15日科创机械指数单日暴涨5.36%。这表明市场对人形机器人产业化的信心正在增强。

对于中国而言，人形机器人是具身智能的重要载体，也是未来制造业和服务业转型升级的关键技术。政府的高规格推动将为产业发展提供强大的政策支持和资源保障。
articles.content_en:
First national-level systematic push for humanoid robots from labs to real scenarios.

On June 9, MIIT and SASAC jointly issued a notice officially launching the 2026 Humanoid Robot and Embodied Intelligence Practical Training Initiative.

The initiative focuses on industrial, service, and special scenarios, deploying six tasks including building practical training spaces, forming innovation application consortiums, and tackling practical skills.

Goal: by end of 2026, humanoid robots complete application verification and normal deployment in representative scenarios, condense over 100 high-value application cases, and build 'practical training—data accumulation—product iteration—scale deployment' industry loop.

This is the first time the state has systematically promoted humanoid robots from labs to real scenarios at such high specifications (dual ministries of MIIT and SASAC). Policy clearly states 'scenario-driven industry', meaning no longer staying at technical demo stage, but entering real production environment verification.

Capital markets have reacted quickly — sci-tech machinery index surged 5.36% on June 15. This shows market confidence in humanoid robot industrialization is strengthening.

For China, humanoid robots are important carriers of embodied intelligence and key technologies for future manufacturing and service industry transformation and upgrading. High-level government push will provide strong policy support and resource guarantees for industrial development.
key_points_en: MIIT and SASAC launch 2026 Humanoid Robot Practical Training Initiative
Focuses on industrial, service, and special scenarios
Goal: humanoid robots complete application verification by end of 2026
